title: Roche | Dr Aviv Regev
text:
Section Title: Dr Aviv Regev > Our leadership team > Education
Content:
**1992–1997**
Tel Aviv University, M.Sc. (direct, Summa cum laude)
**1998–2002**
Tel Aviv University, Ph.D. Computational Biology

Section Title: Dr Aviv Regev
Content:
Head of Genentech Research and Early Development (gRED) (Member of the enlarged CEC since 2020)
About Roche
 ... 
Section Title: Dr Aviv Regev > Our leadership team > Professional Career
Content:
**2003–2006**
Harvard University, Bauer Fellow, Center for Genomics Research
**2006–2011**
MIT, Department of Biology, Assistant Professor
**2006–2020**
Broad Institute of MIT and Harvard, Core Member
**2009–2014**
Howard Hughes Medical Institute, Early Career Scientist
**2011–2015**
MIT, Department of Biology, Associate Professor with Tenure
**2012–2020**
Broad Institute, Klarman Cell Observatory, Founding Director
**2013–2020**
Broad Institute, Cell Circuits Program, Director
**2014–2020**
Broad Institute, Chair of the Faculty and Member of the Executive Leadership Team
**2014–2020**
Howard Hughes Medical Institute, Investigator
**2015–2022**
MIT, Department of Biology, Professor
**Since 2020**
Genentech, Head of Genentech Research and Early Development
